name: Shuttle
description: Dual-listbox transfer widget for moving items between two ordered collections.

members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: Accessible label for the shuttle widget

members.name: value
members.description: Controlled list of selected-item ids (items currently in the right-hand list).

members.name: onValueChange
members.description: Called when items move between the two lists; the new value reflects the right-hand list contents.

selection.description: The set of item ids currently in the right-hand (selected) list. Changes as items are transferred between the two listboxes.

focus.description: Arrow keys move focus within each listbox independently. Focus does not leave the shuttle widget.

keyboard.action: Select or deselect the focused item
Navigate between items in a listbox
Transfer the selected items to the other listbox

usageHints: Use for permission assignment, column selection, or playlist management
Support keyboard: Space to select/deselect, arrow keys to navigate, Enter to transfer
Show item counts in the listbox headers to communicate selection progress
